---
title: "apply_operator"
generated: true
description: "Apply a sparse operator to a per-vertex field, format-agnostically."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.sparse`](../nitrix-sparse.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.sparse._apply`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:apply_operator -->
```python
apply_operator(op: MeshOperator, x: Num[Array, '... n d'], *, semiring: 'Semiring[Any] | None' = None, backend: Backend = 'jax') -> Num[Array, '... m d']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:apply_operator -->
Apply a sparse operator to a per-vertex field, format-agnostically.

Computes the semiring contraction $\mathrm{op} \cdot x$ whether
`op` is a flat [`ELL`](../nitrix-sparse-ell/ELL.qmd) or a bucketed [`SectionedELL`](../nitrix-sparse-ell_sectioned/SectionedELL.qmd).  Leading
axes of `x` are treated as batch and vmapped over the 2-D core (the
operator is shared across the batch -- it is not itself batched), matching
the shape contract of the cross-level mesh wrappers.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:apply_operator -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `op` | `MeshOperator` | — | — | The sparse operator, an [`ELL`](../nitrix-sparse-ell/ELL.qmd) or [`SectionedELL`](../nitrix-sparse-ell_sectioned/SectionedELL.qmd) of shape `(m, n)` mapping an `n`-vertex field to an `m`-vertex field. |
| `x` | `Num` | `...` × `n` × `d` | — | Per-vertex field of shape `(..., n, d)`, where `d` is the trailing feature dimension. For a scalar field use a trailing singleton `(..., n, 1)`. Must be at least 2-D. |
| `semiring` | `'Semiring[Any] | None'` | — | `None` | Algebra to reduce under. Defaults to [`REAL`](../nitrix-semiring.qmd) (resolved lazily to avoid an import cycle). |
| `backend` | `Backend` | — | `'jax'` | Backend passed through to the underlying kernel. `'jax'` (the default) is the only generally-available path for the ELL gather. |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `m` × `d`. The contracted field of shape `(..., m, d)`, carrying the same leading batch axes and trailing feature dimension as `x`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:apply_operator -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
